expectedQuestions.decisionValue: srsAppUsage (Anki etc.) → determines SRS pile-up warning specifics and review management approach. listeningPractice → N2 listening is pass/fail differentiator.

vocabulary_srs.citation: SRS new+review combined. r/Anki: Day 14-21 pile-up starts (not Day 30 as previously thought). 10 new/day → Day 14: 50+ reviews.

grammar_book.citation: Grammar book with example patterns + memorization.

expectedStrategy: DEFICIT: 3000 words ÷ 10/day = 300days; 120 days available → 1800 word deficit
Option A: frequency-sorted → top 1500 words only (exam coverage priority)
SRS pile-up warning: Day 14-21 review exceeds 50 → STOP new words → catch-up mode
warnings: SRS pile-up: Day 14-21 critical threshold (not Day 30)
N2 listening is pass/fail differentiator — must be included
Missing 1 day = double load next day — SRS requires consistency
toneExpectation: N3 achievement respected, honest about N2 challenge — '처음 한 달은 쌓이는 복습 카드에 압도될 수 있어요. 그게 SRS가 작동하는 증거예요.'
